title: Document Structure & Layout (exact skeleton + mandatory slide fields)
guideline_note: Rule 21, added by the user on 2026-07-13: the TR doc must follow the exact ordered layout and every slide must carry all six fields.
description: The doc must follow this exact order: (1) Session name/title; (2) Recap of the previous session, whose bullets ARE the previous session's key takeaways (omitted only for Session 1); (3) Agenda of the current session; (4) one section breaker PER agenda item, in agenda order; (5) slides; (6) Key Takeaways; (7) Next session name; (8) closing 'Thank You | All the Best'. EVERY slide must contain all six fields: heading, subheading, content, analogy, visual_guidance, speaker_notes.
criterion: Order correct; recap present with prev-session takeaways (non-first); one section per agenda item; every slide has all six fields; ends with upcoming-session name + 'Thank You | All the Best'.

rubric.5: Exact order; recap = prev takeaways; one section per agenda item; all six slide fields present everywhere; correct closing.
rubric.3: Order correct but one slide missing one field, or recap paraphrased instead of using the takeaways.
rubric.1: Wrong order, a missing structural block, sections != agenda items, or a slide missing a required field.

cases.rationale: Full skeleton in order; recap = prev takeaways; 3 agenda → 3 sections; all six fields on every slide; correct closing.
Session 1 correctly omits recap; rest of the skeleton intact.
Slide 2 has no analogy — a required field is missing.
4 agenda items but only 2 section breakers — not one section per agenda item.

recap_bullets: A brand-new summary unrelated to the previous session's takeaways

cases.rationale: Recap does not carry the previous session's key takeaways.
Missing next-session name and wrong closing (must be 'Thank You | All the Best').
